control: Only private controlled beta or board review is allowed; public launch remains closed.
next_valid_move: Board approves or rejects private beta scope.

control: External sends, paid actions, advice claims, and supplier recommendations remain zero.
next_valid_move: Keep counters at zero unless a future approved launch gate opens them.

control: Canadian official tools and references are attached with claim boundaries.
next_valid_move: Refresh dates before each board or launch review.

control: Canadian customs/trade/food compliance signoff is required before external claims.
next_valid_move: Route the generated packet to a licensed Canadian customs broker or qualified reviewer.

control: Canadian legal/privacy review is required before public copy, data collection, or fundraising documents are sent as official materials.
next_valid_move: Have counsel/privacy reviewer approve terms, privacy posture, liability boundary, and claims.

control: Funding ask, pricing, runway, and spend plan require founder/accountant/finance review.
next_valid_move: Approve a 12-month operating plan and first 90-day budget before commitments.

control: Source rights, refresh cadence, lineage, and API credentials must be approved before external source claims.
next_valid_move: Add a no-write refresh proof and source-rights approval.

control: Deployment environment, access, logging, backup, incident response, support, and rollback require operator/security approval.
next_valid_move: Approve private beta deployment controls before external users.
